name: cuebook
description: Use Cuebook memory and market data to sharpen a creator-owned idea and express it as one editorial Frame.

interface.shortDescription: Sharpen a market idea and make its logic visible
interface.longDescription: Cuebook has two public skills. Query searches, reads, compares, and explains source-linked market intelligence without writing. Create gives a market intuition a five-beat Cuebook experience: recognize the creator's non-obvious edge, expand it with the smallest useful Cue or data relationship, lock the exact thought once, reveal one relationship visually, and preserve it with a future checkpoint. The creator remains the author. The public Frame contains only a title, reasoned body, image reference, and alt text. Its mobile-first visual can express price or indexed curves, relative strength, drawdown and recovery, rolling correlation, event windows, thresholds, causal paths, evidence tension, conditional scenarios, transparent Creator Lenses, or long-short contributions. Observed history and unresolved future time remain visibly separate; causal hypotheses stay creator-owned, retrospective selection bias is disclosed, and no future price path is fabricated. Workflow, providers, evidence lineage, hashes, upload, consent, and authorization state remain backstage. Publication happens only after explicit intent; withdrawal alone requires separate consent.
defaultPrompt: 查询 USO 最新叙事、市场状态和来源
比较 HOOD 与 COIN 的最新估值口径和市场表现
我觉得 BTC 未来 30 天会比现在高，帮我做成标题、正文和配图完整的 Frame
